title: Government Contract Award
description: Federal or state government contract, grant, or other award from USASpending.gov or equivalent.

award_id.description: Unique award identifier. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, SAM.gov, award notice.

piid.description: Procurement Instrument Identifier (PIID) for contracts. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS.

award_type.description: Type of award. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov award type field.

agency_name.description: Name of the awarding government agency. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, award notice, SAM.gov.

agency_code.description: Agency code. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS agency codes.

sub_agency_name.description: Name of the sub-agency or office. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, award notice.

award_date.description: Date of the award. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov award date, FPDS.

start_date.description: Period of performance start date. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, contract document.

end_date.description: Period of performance end date. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, contract document.

potential_total_value_usd.description: Total potential value of the contract in USD. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS.

obligated_amount_usd.description: Amount obligated in USD. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov obligated amount field.

vendor_name.description: Name of the vendor or awardee. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, award notice, SAM.gov.

vendor_domain.description: Website domain of the vendor. Commonly found in: company website, SAM.gov entity.

vendor_address.description: Street address of the vendor. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, SAM.gov entity.

vendor_city.description: City of the vendor. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, SAM.gov entity.

vendor_state.description: State of the vendor. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, SAM.gov entity.

vendor_country.description: Country of the vendor. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, SAM.gov entity.

vendor_size.description: Business size of the vendor. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS business size.

naics_code.description: NAICS code for the award. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS.

naics_description.description: NAICS code description. Commonly found in: NAICS code lookup, USASpending.gov.

psc_code.description: Product and Service Code (PSC). Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS.

award_description.description: Description of the award. Commonly found in: award notice, USASpending.gov description field.

set_aside_type.description: Set-aside type for socioeconomic programs. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS set-aside type.

competitive_procedures.description: Competitive procedures used. Commonly found in: USASpending.gov, FPDS competition type.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
